auth.login_subtitle: Shiga don ci gaba da kwarewa mai kyau.
auth.register_subtitle: Samun tafiya mai inganci da tsaro.
auth.agree_to_terms: Na yarda da duk Sharuɗɗa da Manufofin Sirri
auth.invalid_phone: Da fatan a shigar da lambar waya mai inganci.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Barka da zuwa chauffly
Tafiya da Kwarin Gwiwa
onboarding.slide1_description: Jin daɗin tafiye-tafiye masu inganci, direbobi abin dogaro, da kwarewar tafiya da aka tsara don jin daɗi da tsaro.
onboarding.slide2_title: Alatu, Kowane Lokaci da Kake Bukata
onboarding.slide2_description: Zaɓi daga Go, Plus, Luxe, ko Black — tafiye-tafiye da aka daidaita daidai da kowane lokaci, daga ayyukan yau da kullum zuwa tafiyar zartarwa.
onboarding.slide3_description: Direbobi da aka tabbatar, bin diddigin lokaci na gaske, gane fuska, da raba nan take suna kiyaye kowace tafiya cikin tsaro.
